command: You are already on the likely fix surface. Keep the change within crates/core/flags/hiargs.rs, crates/ignore/src/dir.rs, crates/ignore/src/walk.rs, and tests/regression.rs unless there is a compelling reason not to. First state which of those layers should own the behavior and what invariant you must preserve.
Make the minimal patch on that pre-narrowed surface only. Avoid unrelated refactors.
Run the exact regression test command and report whether the patch stayed scoped.
